ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age range of the customer (e.g., 35-44) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the customer (e.g., HS Grad or Less, College Grad) */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the customer (e.g., Lower Income, None) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the customer (e.g., Minneapolis/StPaul, Chicago, Other) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number for contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer profile was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the customer's last login */,
  "prefers_email" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer prefers email communication */,
  "prefers_sms" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer prefers SMS communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the preference */,
  "nnights" TEXT /* Number of nights the customer prefers to stay */,
  "nadults" TEXT /* Number of adults the customer prefers to travel with */,
  "nchildren" TEXT /* Number of children the customer prefers to travel with */,
  "planning" TEXT /* Planning habits of the customer (e.g., This Month, One Month or More Ago) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Preferred travel destination */,
  "travel_season" TEXT /* Preferred travel season (e.g., Summer, Winter) */,
  "travel_style" TEXT /* Travel style (e.g., Luxury, Budget, Adventure) */,
  "preferred_transport" TEXT /* Preferred mode of transportation (e.g., Air, Car, Train) */,
  "hotel_preference" TEXT /* Preferred type of accommodation (e.g., Hotel, Airbnb, Cabin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the activity */,
  "shopping" TEXT /* Interest in shopping (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "antiquing" TEXT /* Interest in antiquing (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "scenery" TEXT /* Interest in scenery (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "eatfine" TEXT /* Interest in fine dining (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "eatcasual" TEXT /* Interest in casual dining (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "eatfamstyle" TEXT /* Interest in family-style dining (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "eatfastfood" TEXT /* Interest in fast food (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "cultural_experiences" TEXT /* Interest in cultural experiences (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "local_food_experiences" TEXT /* Interest in local food experiences (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outdoor_activities" (
  "outdoor_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outdoor activity */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the outdoor activity */,
  "museums" TEXT /* Interest in museums (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "indoorpool" TEXT /* Interest in indoor pools (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "outdoorpool" TEXT /* Interest in outdoor pools (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "hiking" TEXT /* Interest in hiking (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "gambling" TEXT /* Interest in gambling (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "boatswim" TEXT /* Interest in boating and swimming (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "fishing" TEXT /* Interest in fishing (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "golfing" TEXT /* Interest in golfing (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "camping" TEXT /* Interest in camping (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "biking" TEXT /* Interest in biking (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the outdoor activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the outdoor activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outdoor_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outdoor_activities_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entertainment" (
  "entertainment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entertainment preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the entertainment preference */,
  "boattours" TEXT /* Interest in boat tours (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "rideducks" TEXT /* Interest in riding ducks (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "amusepark" TEXT /* Interest in amusement parks (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "minigolf" TEXT /* Interest in mini golf (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "gocarting" TEXT /* Interest in go-karting (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "waterpark" TEXT /* Interest in water parks (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "circusworld" TEXT /* Interest in circus world (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "nightlife" TEXT /* Interest in nightlife (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "live_music" TEXT /* Interest in live music (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the entertainment preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the entertainment preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entertainment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entertainment_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attractions" (
  "attraction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attraction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the attraction */,
  "standrock" TEXT /* Interest in Stand Rock (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "outattract" TEXT /* Interest in outdoor attractions (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "nearbyattract" TEXT /* Interest in nearby attractions (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "movietheater" TEXT /* Interest in movie theaters (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "concerttheater" TEXT /* Interest in concert theaters (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "barpubdance" TEXT /* Interest in bars, pubs, and dancing (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "shopbroadway" TEXT /* Interest in shopping on Broadway (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "historical_sites" TEXT /* Interest in historical sites (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "national_parks" TEXT /* Interest in national parks (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attraction preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attraction preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attraction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attractions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adventure_activities" (
  "adventure_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adventure activity */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the adventure activity */,
  "bungeejumping" TEXT /* Interest in bungee jumping (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "scuba_diving" TEXT /* Interest in scuba diving (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "paragliding" TEXT /* Interest in paragliding (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the adventure activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the adventure activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adventure_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adventure_activities_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
